oneMinuteSummary: 本周娱乐亮点：3部电影、3部剧集、30张专辑齐发。电影《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《穿普拉达的女王2》领跑票房；剧集《末日地堡》口碑炸裂；专辑《痴迷》登顶榜单；超级少女新作引发热议。
oneMinuteSummaryEn: This week's entertainment: 3 movies, 3 TV shows, 30 albums dropped. 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' lead box office; 'Silo' series wows critics; album 'Obsession' tops charts; Supergirl new project sparks buzz.
